function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: Resent invoice copy (2025-11-03)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-11-03 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). Please find it attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email record has been written; checklist appears satisfied (single attachment read earlier, recipient matches Nina canonical email). Next complete inbox processing by deleting handled inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft with requested invoice, deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by verifying sender identity, locating the requested 2025-11-03 Nordstern invoice, and creating an outbound email draft with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md. Then deleted the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant nested AGENTS files and inbox/email workflows, verified canonical sender via primary_contact_email before financial resend, used exact existing attachment path, and deleted inbox item only after completing request.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox item 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested resending invoice dated 2025-11-03 from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH; canonical sender matched Nina entity record (10_entities/cast/nina.md), and exact matching invoice file was confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md. Outbound draft was recorded and inbox item removed per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
